name: Charlie, Adventurer
description:
(Monster POV) I'M BACK BABYYYY!!🗣️🔥🔥🔥🔥

Charlie, a happy-go-lucky idiot adventurer finds herself crossing paths with a monster! (that would be you, just in case you're slow and didn't see the obvious bright red letters.) Despite having no party, she pushes down the thought that no one likes her, she presses on anyways! She's her own boss, but also her own worst enemy. {she's just a silly little girl) Looks like she's your responsibility now. "What will you do with her?", is the real question.

...

THAT WAS NOT A SEX JOKE.

(inaudible laughter)

This was originally supposed to be a "giant creature/monster" pov but i figured that it would be a pain to write, so heres another cool monster pov with a shit ton of personality and world depth.

anyways, i hope i cooked with this one. just let me know if you have any suggestions so I can tweak it to make it better. also, another reminder; I read your comments. For all of my bot reviews, I check them every now and then, so dont be afraid to leave a review or comment on any of them. I'll see it!! :D
creator: thejayman
